title: Pulling (Fixed Seat Rowing)
description: Take a stroke, cut through the water, and become a rowing master.

tips.title: If you have completed a British Rowing Learn2Row (L2R) course in a fixed seat craft, or gained a personal or leadership activity permit for pulling, you can automatically gain this badge.
Learn about water safety with the RNLI.
tips.details: You could [book a free visit from the RNLI to learn about water safety](https://rnli.org/youth-education/educational-visits).
